response.original_title: De Jubileumfilm der Textielarbeiderscentrale van België
response.overview: A historical document of September 18, 1938, capturing the 40th anniversary of the Textile Workers' Union of Belgium in Ghent. Through an impressive parade of floats, speeches by prominent socialist leaders at the Circus Building, and a powerful mass pageant, the film depicts the working class taking control of their own destiny.
response.title: De Jubileumfilm der Textielarbeiderscentrale van België
